question: The chart shows regional sales share. Which statement is correct according to the chart data labels?

options.A: East has the highest sales share among all regions.
options.B: Central has the highest sales share among all regions.
options.C: North and West have equal sales shares.
options.D: South has a higher sales share than West.

explanation: From the labels, North has the highest share (45%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Central is largest when relying on visual comparison.
